PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?president ?presidentLabel ?age WHERE {
  ?president wdt:P39 wd:Q5708511 ; wdt:P569 ?birthDate ; wdt:P570 ?deathDate ; wdt:P1196 ?mannerOfDeath .
  VALUES ?mannerOfDeath {
    wd:Q13876 wd:Q7520
  }
  BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?birthDate) , 1 , 4)) AS ?birthYear)
  BIND(xsd:integer(SUBSTR(STR(?deathDate) , 1 , 4)) AS ?deathYear)
  BIND(?deathYear - ?birthYear AS ?age)
  ?president rdfs:label ?presidentLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?presidentLabel) = 'en')
}
